title: Entropy — Information-Theoretic Measures
description: Shannon entropy, cross-entropy, KL divergence, mutual information, normalized entropy, and conditional entropy. Supports bits, nats, and hartleys. Accepts probabilities or raw counts. Pure Rust via nexcore-primitives.

tools.name: compute
tools.description: Compute information-theoretic entropy measures. Modes: shannon (H), cross (H_cross), kl (D_KL), mutual (MI), normalized (H_norm), conditional (H_Y|X). Supports from_counts for raw integers.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: shannon, cross, kl, mutual, normalized, or conditional

parameters.name: joint_rows
parameters.description: Row count for joint matrix (required for mutual, conditional)

parameters.name: from_counts
parameters.description: If true, normalize raw counts to probabilities
